BEAM Agent SDKs

Erlang/OTP and Elixir libraries for AI coding agent wire protocols. OTP-native, fault-tolerant, and production-ready.

OTP 27+ Elixir 1.17+ 5 AI Agents Apache 2.0

Built for the BEAM

Every SDK is a proper OTP application. Supervision trees, telemetry, and fault isolation come standard — not bolted on.

⚙

OTP Supervision

Each agent session is a supervised gen_statem. Crashes are isolated and recoverable.

⚡

Telemetry

State changes, queries, buffer overflows — all instrumented via :telemetry for observability.

🔒

Fail-Closed Permissions

Permission handlers default to deny. Explicit opt-in for tool execution and file access.

🔌

MCP Servers

Define custom tools as Erlang functions. In-process MCP server registry with SDK integration.

📋

Universal API

Threads, checkpoints, session store, and control protocol — available on every adapter.

🔁

Content Blocks

Bidirectional conversion between messages and typed content blocks across all protocols.

Packages

A shared foundation library with five protocol-specific adapters. Each package is available for both Erlang and Elixir.

AW
agent_wire / AgentWireEx
Foundation library

Shared types, JSONL parsing, JSON-RPC, hooks, MCP servers, telemetry, session store, threads, checkpoints, command execution, and the transport behaviour.

Types & Normalization JSONL / JSON-RPC Hooks MCP Registry Telemetry Session Store Threads Checkpoints Commands Control Protocol Transport Behaviour
Erlang Docs Elixir Docs Source
C
ClaudeEx
Claude Code

Anthropic Claude Code agent SDK. Stdio transport, elicitation, session disk store, and native interrupt support.

Erlang Elixir Source
X
CodexEx
OpenAI Codex

OpenAI Codex CLI agent SDK. Dual-mode sessions (interactive + exec), port-based transport, and turn management.

Erlang Elixir Source
CP
CopilotEx
GitHub Copilot

GitHub Copilot agent SDK. LSP-style framing, user input requests, and content-length delimited transport.

Erlang Elixir Source
G
GeminiEx
Google Gemini

Google Gemini CLI agent SDK. JSONL stdio transport with schema-driven tool definitions.

Erlang Elixir Source
O
OpencodeEx
OpenCode

OpenCode agent SDK. HTTP/SSE transport with REST session management and server-sent event streaming.

Erlang Elixir Source

Quick Start

Add a dependency and start a session in a few lines.

# mix.exs {:claude_ex, "~> 0.1"} # Start a session and send a query {:ok, pid} = ClaudeEx.start_session(%{ cli_path: "claude", args: ["--model", "claude-sonnet-4-6"] }) ClaudeEx.stream!(pid, "Explain OTP supervision", fn msg -> IO.inspect(msg, label: "event") end)
%% rebar.config {deps, [{claude_agent_sdk, "~> 0.1"}]}. %% Start a session and send a query {ok, Pid} = claude_agent_sdk:start_link(#{ cli_path => <<"claude">>, args => [<<"--model">>, <<"claude-sonnet-4-6">>] }), claude_agent_sdk:query(Pid, <<"Explain OTP supervision">>).

Compatibility

Runtime Minimum Version Tested Up To
Erlang/OTP2728
Elixir1.171.19
Rebar33.xlatest
